            df_gb_vj = df_vj_combine[["vj", "copy"]].groupby("vj").sum()

            df_gb_vj["copy"] = df_gb_vj["copy"] / df_gb_vj["copy"].sum()

            df_gb_vj.rename(columns={"copy": param_col}, inplace=True)
